# Desert Ways Dubai

> Premium desert safari experiences in Dubai, UAE — evening safari, morning safari, overnight camping, private tours, dune bashing, camel rides, ATV and quad biking. Operating since 2013.

## About

Desert Ways Dubai is a leading desert safari operator in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. We provide authentic Arabian desert adventures combining traditional Bedouin hospitality with modern adventure activities including dune bashing in 4x4 vehicles, camel riding, sandboarding, henna painting, BBQ buffet dinner, and live entertainment (belly dance, tanoura, fire show).

- **Website:** https://www.desertwaysdubai.com/
- **Founded:** 2013
- **Rating:** 4.8/5 from 10,000+ customers
- **Location:** Dubai, UAE
- **Service area:** Dubai and surrounding desert regions

## Contact

- **Phone:** +971 52 949 4852
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/971529494852
- **Email:** info@desertwaysdubai.com

## Desert Safari Packages

| Package | Starting Price | Highlights |
|---------|---------------|------------|
| Evening Desert Safari - Basic | AED 99 | Dune bashing, camel ride, BBQ dinner, live shows, free pickup |
| Evening Safari with ATV | AED 149 | Basic package + 20 min ATV ride |
| Premium Desert Safari | AED 249 | Luxury camp, premium buffet, extended entertainment |
| Morning Desert Safari | AED 149 | Sunrise dune bashing, camel riding, sandboarding |
| Overnight Desert Safari | AED 449 | Full evening program + camping with breakfast |
| Evening Safari - Private Car | AED 599 | Private 4x4 pickup, exclusive experience |

## Activities Included

- Dune bashing in red dunes (4x4 vehicles with licensed drivers)
- Camel riding (traditional desert experience)
- Sandboarding on golden dunes
- Quad biking / ATV rides (select packages)
- Henna painting for ladies and kids
- Arabic costumes for photos
- Veg & non-veg BBQ buffet dinner
- Live entertainment: belly dance, tanoura, fire show
- Unlimited coffee, tea, Arabic sweets, soft drinks and water

## Why Choose Desert Ways Dubai

- Free hotel pickup and drop-off in Dubai
- Licensed professional desert guides
- Safety equipment provided
- Instant confirmation via WhatsApp or phone
- Family-friendly and group-friendly tours
- Best desert safari prices in Dubai since 2013

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is included in a Dubai desert safari package?**
Hotel pickup/drop-off, dune bashing, camel riding, sandboarding, henna painting, BBQ dinner, live entertainment, and unlimited drinks.

**What should I wear for a desert safari?**
Comfortable light-colored clothing, sports shoes. Bring a light jacket in winter (Nov–Mar) and sunglasses.

**Can children join?**
Yes. Gentler dune bashing available on request. Children under 3 usually free; special rates for ages 3–10.

**Best time for desert safari in Dubai?**
October to April for mild weather. Morning or overnight safaris recommended in summer (May–September).
